step_rationale: F2-isoprostane marker of lipid peroxidation; reflects oxidative damage in atherosclerotic plaque.
mechanism: 8-iso-PGF2α quantifies free-radical-driven lipid peroxidation in atherogenic lipoprotein oxidation and plaque destabilization.

references.title: Isoprostanes: potential markers of oxidant stress in atherothrombotic disease.
